Primary keys: labels

var_relabel.Rd

Apply labels to ADSL primary key variables

var_relabel(x, ...)

Arguments

x

data frame containing variables to which labels are applied.
...

ellipsis.

Examples

ADSL <- radsl()
random.cdisc.data:::var_relabel(ADSL, STUDYID = "Study Identifier",
USUBJID = "Unique Subject Identifier")
#> # A tibble: 400 x 33
#>    STUDYID USUBJID SUBJID SITEID   AGE SEX   RACE  COUNTRY INVID INVNAM ARM  
#>    <chr>   <chr>   <chr>  <chr>  <int> <fct> <fct> <fct>   <chr> <chr>  <fct>
#>  1 AB12345 AB1234… id-399 CHN-6     32 F     BLAC… CHN     INV … Dr. C… A: D…
#>  2 AB12345 AB1234… id-97  USA-1     47 M     BLAC… USA     INV … Dr. U… B: P…
#>  3 AB12345 AB1234… id-282 CHE-1     44 M     ASIAN CHE     INV … Dr. C… A: D…
#>  4 AB12345 AB1234… id-15  CHN-15    38 M     BLAC… CHN     INV … Dr. C… A: D…
#>  5 AB12345 AB1234… id-325 JPN-11    26 M     ASIAN JPN     INV … Dr. J… B: P…
#>  6 AB12345 AB1234… id-157 JPN-3     32 M     ASIAN JPN     INV … Dr. J… C: C…
#>  7 AB12345 AB1234… id-193 USA-1     42 M     ASIAN USA     INV … Dr. U… B: P…
#>  8 AB12345 AB1234… id-284 CHN-1     32 F     BLAC… CHN     INV … Dr. C… A: D…
#>  9 AB12345 AB1234… id-382 CHN-15    24 F     ASIAN CHN     INV … Dr. C… C: C…
#> 10 AB12345 AB1234… id-17  CHN-11    24 M     BLAC… CHN     INV … Dr. C… C: C…
#> # … with 390 more rows, and 22 more variables: ARMCD <fct>, ACTARM <fct>,
#> #   ACTARMCD <fct>, REGION1 <fct>, STRATA1 <fct>, STRATA2 <fct>, BMRKR1 <dbl>,
#> #   BMRKR2 <fct>, ITTFL <fct>, SAFFL <fct>, BMEASIFL <fct>, BEP01FL <fct>,
#> #   RANDDT <date>, TRTSDTM <dttm>, TRTEDTM <dttm>, EOSSTT <fct>, EOSDT <date>,
#> #   EOSDY <int>, DCSREAS <fct>, DTHDT <date>, LSTALVDT <date>,
#> #   study_duration_secs <dbl>
